gene_region.label: FTO transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical FTO genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window used by this app to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval begins.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: FTO encodes FTO, an Fe(II)/2-oxoglutarate-dependent RNA demethylase. This bundle emphasizes RNA demethylation, appetite and adiposity association biology, m6A regulation, energy balance, and IRX3/IRX5 regulatory context.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local FTO bundle is adiposity and RNA-modification review oriented. Interpret markers through exact allele class, zygosity, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context rather than as stand-alone deterministic calls.
variant_effect_overview: FTO variants can alter or tag RNA demethylation, appetite and adiposity association biology, m6A regulation, energy balance, and IRX3/IRX5 regulatory context; effect direction depends on allele class, tissue, dosage, and biological context.
Common markers, pharmacogenetic alleles, structural events, and high-impact pathogenic variants should be kept separate during interpretation.
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: FTO methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a RNA demethylation, appetite and adiposity association biology, m6A regulation, energy balance, and IRX3/IRX5 regulatory context gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for FTO.
Because FTO biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.

Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against RNA demethylation, appetite and adiposity association biology, m6A regulation, energy balance, and IRX3/IRX5 regulatory context.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use FTO promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for RNA demethylation, appetite and adiposity association biology, m6A regulation, energy balance, and IRX3/IRX5 regulatory context.

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000140718: FTO coordinate source

biorender_visuals.label: FTO biochemical figure starter
biorender_visuals.focus: FTO: RNA demethylation, appetite and adiposity association biology, m6A regulation, energy balance, and IRX3/IRX5 regulatory context
biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a FTO adiposity and RNA-modification review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to RNA demethylation, appetite and adiposity association biology, m6A regulation, energy balance, and IRX3/IRX5 regulatory context and Obesity and BMI association context, Energy balance and appetite biology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

variant_records.clinical_interpretation: rs9939609 (FTO obesity association marker) is curated as a FTO marker for Obesity and BMI association context, Energy balance and appetite biology. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the RNA demethylation, appetite and adiposity association biology, m6A regulation, energy balance, and IRX3/IRX5 regulatory context pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Curated research and clinical-context marker; external clinical classification is required for diagnostic use.
functional_effects: Can modify or tag RNA demethylation, appetite and adiposity association biology, m6A regulation, energy balance, and IRX3/IRX5 regulatory context.
Best interpreted with tissue, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context.
research_context: Use this marker as a FTO pathway-context signal, not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Sequence, methylation, expression, and protein data may point in different directions and should be reconciled.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: Pair rs9939609 (FTO obesity association marker) with FTO methylation only as local regulatory context; methylation does not prove the variant's biochemical effect.

literature_findings.genotypes: rs9939609 (FTO obesity association marker) or linked FTO locus genotype states
literature_findings.phenotype: Obesity and BMI association context, Energy balance and appetite biology
literature_findings.finding: The local curation treats rs9939609 (FTO obesity association marker) as a gene-specific marker for Obesity and BMI association context, Energy balance and appetite biology and RNA demethylation, appetite and adiposity association biology, m6A regulation, energy balance, and IRX3/IRX5 regulatory context.
